rows.Key Lesson: Parametric bonds can produce real payouts under defined triggers
rows.Explanation: The IBRD CAR 120 updates describe a quantified 30% principal payout following a major event
rows.Relevance for Sovereign Finance: Demonstrates operational effectiveness of sovereign parametric cover
rows.Possible Relevance for Israel: Inference based on source: Israel could benchmark payout design and operational timelines

rows.Key Lesson: Clear calculation timelines matter for fiscal planning
rows.Explanation: The update notes mention determination windows and report delivery timelines
rows.Possible Relevance for Israel: Inference based on source: relevant to contingency planning frameworks
